conversations.content: Today we studied the Darnassus Sentinel Army Wartime Emergency Decree. If corrupted water from Felwood is found flowing toward the border...
Corrupted water? That's a source of pollution! How do you respond?
then pour Moonwell holy water to purify it.
Purify with Moonwell holy water — that's the night elves' heritage! Any other threats?
If a Burning Legion demon portal is observed opening, then sound the Horn of Cenarius to summon reinforcements.
Demon portal opens — sound the horn to call reinforcements — decisive! What's the third scenario?
If shadow is detected seeping into the roots of the World Tree, then awaken the ancient protector to expel it.
Shadow seeping into roots — awaken the ancient — nature's might counters! Is there a fourth?
If enemy dragons launch a dive airstrike on the Temple of the Moon, then activate Elune's Shield to protect the high priestess.
Dragon airstrike — activate Elune's Shield, protect the priestess! Understood!

think: Darnassus Sentinel Army wartime decree: four threats and corresponding measures: corrupted water → Moonwell holy water purification; demon portal → Horn of Cenarius to summon reinforcements; shadow seeping into World Tree roots → awaken ancient protector to expel; dragon airstrike on Moon Temple → activate Elune's Shield to protect high priestess.
memory: Darnassus Sentinel Army Wartime Emergency Decree: If corrupted water from Felwood is found flowing toward the border, then pour Moonwell holy water to purify it; if a Burning Legion demon portal is observed opening, then sound the Horn of Cenarius to summon reinforcements; if shadow is detected seeping into the roots of the World Tree, then awaken the ancient protector to expel it; if enemy dragons launch a dive airstrike on the Temple of the Moon, then activate Elune's Shield to protect the high priestess.
